# marketplace-ad-templates
Description: Generate Facebook Marketplace ad copy blocks for buying iPhones, with customizable city and tone.
Source: project
1. To generate an ad, specify the target city using the `--city` flag. For example, `--city "Las Vegas"`.
2. Optionally, you can specify the desired tone for the ad using the `--tone` flag. Common tones might include `urgent`, `friendly`, `professional`, or `casual`.
3. The skill will output a formatted ad copy block, ready for use on Facebook Marketplace, with the city placeholder automatically substituted and the tone reflected in the messaging.
